def process_payload(data: bytes) -> bytes:
    text = data.decode("utf-8")
    lines = text.splitlines()
    result = "\n".join(line.strip() for line in lines)
    return result.encode("utf-8")


def normalize_bytes(raw: bytes) -> bytes:
    decoded = raw.decode("ascii")
    cleaned = decoded.strip().lower()
    return cleaned.encode("ascii")


def transform(data: bytes) -> bytes:
    s = data.decode("utf-8")
    modified = s.replace("old", "new")
    return modified.encode("utf-8")
